title: Hot Flashes at Night: Why They Disrupt Sleep and How to Get Relief
tags: hot flashes, night sweats, sleep, menopause, magnesium, hormones, women over 40
summary: Nocturnal hot flashes during menopause disrupt sleep architecture at the cellular level, reducing deep sleep stages and fragmenting rest even when women do not fully wake. This article explains the hypothalamic mechanism behind night sweats, their downstream health effects, and practical non-hormonal strategies including magnesium to reduce symptoms and protect sleep quality.
featured_image_alt: Woman finding relief and restful sleep during menopause
